## [00:00 - 00:45]

I am Jeremy Brohner and I actually run a part-time burger blog. I'm a part-time DJ. I'm undefeated at the limbo and I can talk like Donald Duck. But wait, that's not what you're here for. You're here to hear my role at Mastermind. Sorry. Anyway, I'm the sales director here and I've over 16 years of sales experience and one of my specialties is taking someone that's never done sales before and making them into a sales professional. I have a lot of tips. I have a lot of tricks that I give them and damn, when they get good, they fly away and they do big things. So I'm hoping through this I can give you some of my tips and tricks and then you can too.
